case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. ALICE TRIPLETT ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TRIPLETT, ALICE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-04-2020
DECLARATION RE: DILIGENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 200004174) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
